user.title: Set up a Bag
user.description:
Create a new bag of items to pick from randomly. Either fill in the items list, or provide a Home Assistant template expression — the generator takes precedence if filled.

Generator examples:
• `{{ range(1, 53) | list }}`
• `{{ ['Mon', 'Tue', 'Wed', 'Thu', 'Fri'] }}`

error.items_empty: Please enter at least one item.
error.generator_invalid: Template expression is invalid or did not return a list.

init.title: Edit Bag Items
init.description:
Update the items list or generator. Submit to preview the resolved items before saving.

Generator examples:
• `{{ range(1, 53) | list }}`
• `{{ ['Mon', 'Tue', 'Wed', 'Thu', 'Fri'] }}`

preview.title: Preview Resolved Items

error.items_empty: Please enter at least one item.
error.generator_invalid: Template expression is invalid or did not return a list.

pick_next.name: Pick next
pick_next.description: Pick the next item from the bag. Reshuffles automatically when the bag is exhausted.

reset.name: Reset bag
reset.description: Reshuffle the bag from scratch, discarding the current cycle.
